title: Lance of Longinus
wikitext:
[]: Lance of Longinus? Post by Hunter21 » Sat Jun 26, 2004 6:59 am I have always wondered where the second lance came from that struck Asuka. The lance itself is one of a kind so I don't understand how seele developed/created another one?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 26, 2004 12:01 pm From the Red Cross Book, translated by Patrick Yip: [Spear of Longinus (copy)] The fighting weapon used by the mass-production model EVA. It is modelled on the Spear of Longinus and its shape and length can change. When it penetrates a A.T.Field, the two tips which branch out from the spear's end spiral into one and intrude into the field. At ep.25, this spear penetrates the A.T.Field of EVA02 and then the still-fighting EVA02 itself, and EVA02 stops. This spear cannot be used for Complementation which involves Lilith, but as a weapon it has almost the same power as the original Spear.

[]: Post by alyss_heart » Sat Apr 14, 2007 9:18 pm no the lance was a crutial part in the end of evangelion. it was used along with the tree of life to bring the 3rd impact. so it had to be called forth from the moon after it was stuck there. and the lance was brought to the start of the phase for the tree of life...by the replicas, the evas that were controlled by the dummy plug then it just started working on its own. and formed with unit 01

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Apr 14, 2007 9:38 pm We already have a thread on this particular topic .

Article: Lance of Longinus
[]: Lance of Longinus? Post by Hunter21 » Sat Jun 26, 2004 6:59 am I have always wondered where the second lance came from that struck Asuka. The lance itself is one of a kind so I don't understand how seele developed/created another one?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 26, 2004 12:01 pm From the Red Cross Book, translated by Patrick Yip: [Spear of Longinus (copy)] The fighting weapon used by the mass-production model EVA. It is modelled on the Spear of Longinus and its shape and length can change. When it penetrates a A.T.Field, the two tips which branch out from the spear's end spiral into one and intrude into the field. At ep.25, this spear penetrates the A.T.Field of EVA02 and then the still-fighting EVA02 itself, and EVA02 stops. This spear cannot be used for Complementation which involves Lilith, but as a weapon it has almost the same power as the original Spear.

[]: Post by alyss_heart » Sat Apr 14, 2007 9:18 pm no the lance was a crutial part in the end of evangelion. it was used along with the tree of life to bring the 3rd impact. so it had to be called forth from the moon after it was stuck there. and the lance was brought to the start of the phase for the tree of life...by the replicas, the evas that were controlled by the dummy plug then it just started working on its own. and formed with unit 01
